title: Force Guide Delete Sequence
description:
Force Guide Delete Sequence

Force Guide Delete Sequence

[Delete Force Guide Sequence] dialog box

Item	Description

Selection
		 list	Select a force
		 guide sequence to be deleted.

[Delete]
		 button	Delete a highlighted
		 force guide sequence.  When you click the button, a confirmation
		 message is displayed.

[Yes]
		 button:  Delete a force guide sequence.

[No]
		 button:  Cancel a deletion.

[Cancel]
		 button	Cancel a deletion
		 of a force guide sequence.

End
		 the [Delete Force Guide Sequence] dialog box.
